title: Savory Crisp Peruvian Feather Blade Beef Skewers
description: A show-off dish featuring feather blade beef with a savory and crispy texture, sugar-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1 pound Feather Blade Beef
ingredients.notes: ensure meat is fully frozen and thawed as needed

instructions: Place beef on a baking sheet, brush with vegetable oil and sprinkle with onion. Season with salt and pepper.
Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place skewers in the oven for 20-25 minutes or until meat is cooked through.
Squeeze lime juice over beef during last 10 minutes of cooking for added freshness and flavor.
Let rest before slicing into medallions to serve.
